revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:出水神社 (加賀市)]] {{Expand Japanese|出水神社 (加賀市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Izumi Shrine (Q11395685) | native_name = 出水神社 | image = Hall of worship of Izumi Shrine.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Izumi Shrine (Q11395685) | coordinates = {{coord|36.347749|136.309193}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Hoori|lt=Hoori|bs|Hoori|en|Hoori|fa|هوری (اسطوره ژاپن)|fr|Hoori|hr|Hoori|it|Hoori|ja|ホオリ|ko|호오리|mni|ꯍꯨꯔꯤ|nl|Ho-ori|no|Hoori|pl|Hoori|pt|Yamasatihiko|ru|Хоори|sh|Hoori|simple|Hoori|sr|Хоори|sv|Hoori|tr|Hoori|uk|Хоорі|vi|Hoori|zh|火折尊|qid=Q1051960|1=Hoori}} }} {{nihongo|'''Izumi Shrine'''|出水神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kaga Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11399659|ltq=Q11399659|qid=Q11399659|1=List of Shikinaisha in Kaga Province}} ** Series ordinal: 9 ** P155: {{ill|Hiokino Shrine|lt=Hiokino Shrine|qid=Q135040268|1=Hiokino Shrine (Q135040268)}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135040269|ltq=Q135040269|qid=Q135040269|1=Ketamikono Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q120103|ltq=Q120103|qid=Q120103|1=Kaga, Ishikawa}} * {{ill|Kaga Province|lt=Kaga Province|cs|Provincie Kaga|de|Provinz Kaga|en|Kaga Province|eo|Provinco Kaga|es|Provincia de Kaga|fa|ولایت کاگا|fi|Kagan provinssi|fr|Province de Kaga|gl|Provincia de Kaga|id|Provinsi Kaga|it|Kaga (provincia)|ja|加賀国|ko|가가국|lt|Kagos provincija|nl|Kaga (provincie)|pt|Província de Kaga|ru|Кага (провинция)|simple|Kaga Province|sk|Kaga (provincia)|sr|Провинција Кага|tr|Kaga (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Каґа|zh_min_nan|Kaga-kok|zh_yue|加賀國|zh|加賀國|qid=Q907469|1=Kaga Province}} * {{ill|Q5380885|ltq=Q5380885|qid=Q5380885|1=Enuma District, Ishikawa}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|36.347749|136.309193}} == image (P18) == * Hall of worship of Izumi Shrine.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q1051960|ltq=Q1051960|qid=Q1051960|1=Hoori}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182310 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Gō-sha|lt=Gō-sha|ja|郷社|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == TripAdvisor ID (P3134) == * 12690413 == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 3220005004087 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '石川県加賀市橋立町ホ1', 'language': 'ja'} == image of entrance (P9721) == * Izumi shrine.jpg == described at URL (P973) == * http://engishiki.org/kaga/bun/kag320109-01.html [[JA:出水神社 (加賀市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11395685}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Izumi Shrine |画像 = [[File:Izumi shrine.jpg|250px|Izumi Shrine (Kaga City)]]
Torii |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|qid=Q131281|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kaga|Q120103|qid=Q120103|1=Kaga, Ishikawa}} Hashitate-machi Ho 1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hoori|1=UNKNOWN}}・{{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime|1=Toyotama-hime}}・{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}・{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Inari Ōkami|1=UNKNOWN}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (small)・former {{ill|lt=district shrine|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = 17th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Keikō|Q329723|qid=Q329723|1=Emperor Keikō}} (87 CE) |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 2|Q2932|qid=Q2932|1=October 2}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Ishikawa|label=出水神社|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Izumi Shrine''' (いずみじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} at Hashitate-machi Ho 1, {{ill|lt=Kaga|Q120103|qid=Q120103|1=Kaga, Ishikawa}}, {{ill|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|Q131281|qid=Q131281|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}. === Overview === Its enshrined deities are {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hoori|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime|1=Toyotama-hime}}, {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}, and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Inari Ōkami|1=UNKNOWN}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}}. In 1883 (Meiji 16), it was ranked as a district shrine. === References === * Stone inscription in the precincts: ''Kaga-no-kuni Enuma-gō Hashitate-mura Yurai-ki'', by Kishi Yakaatsu, 1996 (Heisei 8) * ''Ishikawa Prefecture Shrine Register'', edited by Ishikawa Prefecture Shrine Office (published Oct. 26, 1976) * ''Kano Kyōdo Jii'', by Hoki Ken (published Aug. 1, 1956, Hokuriku Shimbun) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === Related articles === *{{ill|lt=Kaga Hashitate|Q11399695|qid=Q11399695|1=Kaga Hashitate}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Izumi Shrine (Kaga)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Izumi Shrine (Kaga)]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ishikawa Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kaga]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kaga Province]] [[Category:石川県の旧郷社]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kaga, Ishikawa]]
